description_long: This banner object features a rectangular block form with a highly textured upper surface resembling a stylized topographic landscape. The top is undulating, with soft gradients of pastel colors including greens, pinks, and browns, giving it an abstract, almost geological appearance. The sides of the object are vertically striated, with the color and texture fading smoothly into a white or translucent base, suggesting a transition from solid to ethereal. There are no visible text, logos, or images on the surface, and the object appears to be a solid piece without any cutouts or attachments. The overall look is modern and artistic, making it suitable for decorative or promotional use in urban environments. The lack of visible mounting hardware or support structures suggests it is designed to be freestanding.
description: A rectangular, freestanding banner with a textured, pastel-colored top resembling a stylized landscape and smooth, striated sides fading to white.
description_view_0: The front view shows the broad, undulating top surface with pastel hues and a gentle slope, with the striated sides fading downward.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the vertical striations and the depth of the object, with the top surface's texture visible along the edge.
description_view_2: The rear view mirrors the front, showing the textured top and the gradient fade of the sides, with subtle color variations.
description_view_3: The opposite side view emphasizes the height and the transition from the colored top to the white base, with the topography visible along the edge.
